stem: A scatterplot of seven data points plots y against x. The points are approximately (1, 3), (2, 5), (3, 6), (4, 9), (5, 10), (6, 13), and (7, 14). Which of the following best models the relationship between x and y?

answerOptions.content: A decreasing linear model with negative slope.
An increasing linear model with positive slope.

rationale: As x increases from 1 to 7, the y-values rise steadily from about 3 to about 14, indicating a positive, roughly linear relationship. Therefore, an increasing linear model best fits the data. A decreasing or constant model would not capture the upward trend, and a downward-opening parabola would not match a steady increase.
